summary: Iteration 47 - EchoStratus Aurum GL Actuals Bridge & POS/GL Integration Hub Test PASSED. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend EchoStratus panel fully functional with all 14 views working. New features tested: Actuals View (EchoAurum GL Bridge), POS/GL Integration Hub (Toast POS & QuickBooks), PDF Board Report export.
critical_code_review_comments: EchoStratus frontend (~2000 lines) is well-structured with clear component separation for all 14 views

Actuals View (AurumView): Shows EchoAurum GL Actuals Bridge with 6 KPI cards (Revenue, EBITDA, Food Cost, Bev Cost, Labor, Covers), Budget vs Actual Bridge table with monthly variance, Revenue by Outlet bar chart
POS/GL View (IntegrationsView): Shows Toast POS and QuickBooks Online integration cards with CONNECTED status, Data Flow Architecture diagram, Integration Setup instructions, Export JSON button
Executive View: Board Report button visible and functional, opens PDF export endpoint
All views have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API calls use window.location.origin for proper URL handling
IBM Plex fonts and Bloomberg Terminal dark aesthetic implemented correctly
Real data from MongoDB displayed with proper formatting (currency, percentages)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 14 views working, all navigation tabs clickable)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tests use existing MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified the new EchoAurum GL Actuals Bridge and POS/GL Integration Hub features in EchoStratus. All 14 navigation tabs work: Executive, Ask, Budget, Actuals, Forecast, What-If (Scenarios), Projects, CapEx, Events (Activations), Signals, Actions (Recommendations), Portfolio, Risk, POS/GL. New API endpoints tested: GET /api/echo-stratus/aurum/actuals (GL actuals with 12 monthly breakdowns), GET /api/echo-stratus/aurum/actuals/by-outlet (per-outlet revenue), GET /api/echo-stratus/aurum/budget-bridge/{id} (budget vs actual variance), GET /api/echo-stratus/report/executive-pdf (HTML board report), GET /api/echo-stratus/report/data-export (JSON export), GET /api/pos-gl/status (Toast POS & QuickBooks status). Frontend panel accessible via sidebar 'EchoStratus' button.

backend_api_tests.aurum_actuals: PASS - returns GL actuals with 12 monthly breakdowns, annual totals (Revenue, EBITDA, Food Cost, Labor), data_points (93 GL entries, labor, 38 events)
backend_api_tests.aurum_actuals_by_outlet: PASS - returns per-outlet revenue with food_cost_pct and avg_check for 6 outlets
backend_api_tests.aurum_budget_bridge: PASS - returns monthly budget vs actual bridge with variance (favorable/unfavorable status), YTD totals, data quality indicator
backend_api_tests.pos_gl_status: PASS - returns Toast POS (connected) and QuickBooks Online (connected) integration status with features list
backend_api_tests.toast_connect_sandbox: PASS - connects Toast POS in sandbox mode, returns connection_id and status=connected
backend_api_tests.quickbooks_connect_sandbox: PASS - connects QuickBooks in sandbox mode, returns connection_id and status=connected
backend_api_tests.executive_pdf_report: PASS - returns HTML board report with Content-Disposition header for download, includes Financial Performance Summary, AI Executive Intelligence Briefing, Outlet Performance, Pipeline & Events
backend_api_tests.data_export_json: PASS - returns JSON export with gl_entries, events, outlets, budgets, summary (total_revenue, ebitda, total_events)

frontend_ui_tests.panel_loads: PASS - EchoStratus panel opens from sidebar
frontend_ui_tests.navigation_14_tabs: PASS - All 14 tabs visible and clickable (Executive, Ask, Budget, Actuals, Forecast, What-If, Projects, CapEx, Events, Signals, Actions, Portfolio, Risk, POS/GL)
frontend_ui_tests.actuals_view: PASS - aurum-view, budget-bridge, outlet-actuals all found
frontend_ui_tests.actuals_kpis: PASS - 6 KPI cards: Actual Revenue $216.1K, Actual EBITDA $129.2K (59.79%), Food Cost $16.8K (7.77%), Bev Cost $14.8K, Labor $47.8K (22.11%), Covers 5,705
frontend_ui_tests.actuals_budget_bridge: PASS - Budget vs Actual Bridge table with monthly budget/actual/variance for Revenue, Food Cost, Labor, EBITDA
frontend_ui_tests.actuals_outlet_chart: PASS - Revenue by Outlet (GL Actuals) bar chart with outlets showing revenue, food cost %, avg check
frontend_ui_tests.actuals_data_quality: PASS - Data quality indicator showing 93 GL entries, labor, 38 events
frontend_ui_tests.posgl_toast_card: PASS - Toast POS card with CONNECTED status, Last Sync, Records, Health
frontend_ui_tests.posgl_quickbooks_card: PASS - QuickBooks Online card with CONNECTED status, Last Sync, Records, Health
frontend_ui_tests.posgl_data_flow: PASS - Data Flow Architecture diagram: Toast POS → QuickBooks → EchoAurum → EchoStratus → Board Report
frontend_ui_tests.posgl_integration_setup: PASS - Integration Setup instructions text visible
frontend_ui_tests.posgl_export_json: PASS - Export JSON button visible and clickable
frontend_ui_tests.executive_board_report: PASS - Board Report button visible and clickable in Executive view

mocked_apis.note: Toast POS and QuickBooks are in sandbox mode (connected but no live OAuth). POS/GL status API returns pre-configured sandbox connections. All other APIs return real data from MongoDB.

budget_bridge_table.title: BUDGET VS ACTUAL BRIDGE — TEST_FY2026 OPERATING BUDGET

posgl_view.title: POS & GL INTEGRATION HUB
posgl_view.integration_setup: POS and GL integrations are pre-configured for sandbox mode. When ready for production, provide OAuth credentials via the Admin settings panel.

executive_view.board_report_button: Board Report button visible in top right, opens /api/echo-stratus/report/executive-pdf
